subcodes.first_line: O divine spirit! The time hath come when thou must open thy lips and, upon the branches of the Tree of Unity, raise thy melody in song [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای روحانی الهی وقت آنست که زبان بگشاای و بر شاخسار توحید نغمه بسراای و از ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @role and station of women
